theme: the snapshot mechanism — capture the PUBLIC reference library (taxonomy + Directus content) and replay it into a stack, lifting the two M7c-waived surfaces to 100% data-DNA coverage (the full-fidelity, set-dressed demo world)

alignment_framework.note: stdlib-only; moved from rosetta/test/alignment into the extensions clone in v1.1; unchanged in v1.2

clerkenstein_mirror.note: unchanged vs v1.1 close (the mock surface)

stack_snapshot.note: NET-NEW in v1.2 (M9a framework -> M9b taxonomy surface -> M10 directus content surface -> M11 hygiene/drift guards)

stack_seeding.note: grew via the snapshot-fidelity dimension: CapturedFromManifest bridge, PgFidelityProbe, MeasureSnapshot, ContentSnapshotSeeder DAG node, contentref linkage resolver, shipped-preset regression tests

aggregate.delta: +299 (+73%) — no regression; v1.2 adds the stack-snapshot module and extends stack-seeding's snapshot-fidelity dimension

test_health.race: all 4 Go modules pass go test ./... -race (exit 0)
test_health.flake_gate: triple-clean: 3 consecutive clean runs of both v1.2-touched modules (stack-snapshot, stack-seeding), -race + -shuffle

stack_snapshot.note: pg/cmd lower numbers are live-DB Conn bodies behind the interface seam, integration-proven

stack_seeding.note: pg -2.7pp vs v1.1 (60.0) is denominator growth from new live-DB Conn methods, no tests removed; all pure-logic packages rose

coverage_snapshot.regression_vs_v1_1: no logic-coverage regression: blueprint +2.1, seeders +6.6, dna +5.9, cmd_datadna +8.8; pg movement is live-DB-method denominator growth, integration-tested

snapshot_gates.tenant_firewall: per-surface PublicPredicate, plan-time AssertPlan + post-capture AssertCaptured, hard-fail on any tenant row; payloads stashed in-memory until ALL tables pass (nothing persisted on a leak)
snapshot_gates.data_dna_coverage: 100% over the full catalog — taxonomy (snapshot-seeded-M9b) + Directus content (snapshot-seeded-M10), the two M7c-waived surfaces promoted; nothing left waived (the v1.2 thesis complete)
snapshot_gates.fidelity: CapturedFromManifest (source) vs PgFidelityProbe (replay) -> MeasureSnapshot composes score, gates critical 100%; 5 snapshot-fidelity operators (row-count/structural/referential/embedding-dim/public-only)
snapshot_gates.fuzz: FuzzSanitize, FuzzSplitCSV, FuzzBuildParentLeakProbe (incl. multi-level chain) — all 0 crashers

supply_chain.audit: govulncheck v1.3.0 + go vet (clean) + license scan
supply_chain.stdlib_called_vulns: 12 (clerkenstein) — Go stdlib go1.25.3, all fixed go1.25.6..go1.25.11; cleared by building with the go1.25.11+ toolchain
supply_chain.licenses: all permissive — MIT / BSD-3 / Apache-2.0 / ISC; NO GPL/AGPL/LGPL

repos.rosetta: the corpus + plan + knowledge (public); ZERO tracked .go files — the v1.2 release diff's 33 .go entries are all DELETIONS (the test/alignment + test/*.sh trees moved into the extensions clone)
repos.rosetta_extensions: the private monorepo — 4 Go modules: clerkenstein, alignment, stack-snapshot (new), stack-seeding

carried_to_v1_3: DEF-M10-01 — Directus S3 blob bytes (media.go BlobBytesAvailable + provision.go per-stack Directus provisioning: built + unit-tested, unreachable from any entrypoint, gated on S3-read access — Fate-2 -> v1.3 cloud-store seed)

verdict: GREEN — test count +73% (no decrease), coverage up/flat on every continuing logic package (pg movement is live-DB denominator growth), flake 0, vet/gofmt clean, zero third-party CVEs, all-permissive licenses. The only supply-chain item is a Go-stdlib toolchain bump (go1.25.11+).
